summary: Implemented IC-5 as a shell script (tools/ci/check-ic5-no-self-enable.sh) that statically scans all module source files under modules/ for any occurrence of default_enabled: true. Also checks module package.json files. Modeled after the existing check-dep-graph.sh pattern. Wired into CI as a named step replacing the IC-5 stub. Added pnpm check:ic5 convenience script. Verified: passes on current codebase, correctly detects injected violations with file:line diagnostics.

verification.notes: Verified against current modules (PASS). Verified violation detection with injected default_enabled: true (correctly FAILs with file:line).
